translations.01KQXQV12BDQ5FD2M4TZTTMJXD: 无法为 {workspace_root_display} 启动 LSP 服务器，错误：{e}
translations.01KQXQV12HD34ZB9QYCH0PPQ8A: 语音转写已禁用，因为未授予麦克风访问权限。
translations.01KQXQV129VHM0V08YP8C7C9K1: 调用环境变量时发生错误
translations.01KQXQV12GBARXK2BXD90K4N19: 由于与您的密钥脱敏设置冲突，无法创建此环境变量。请将密钥保存为环境变量（在您的 shell 配置或 .env 文件中），或在“设置 > 隐私”中更新您的密钥脱敏设置。
translations.01KQXQV12GJ8CBQ4G2BTS2E2YG: 由于与您企业的密钥脱敏设置冲突，无法创建此环境变量。请联系团队管理员了解详情。
translations.01KQXQV12J6BYK7F2D1BCVY8WQ: oz cloud platform api keys authentication 云 平台 接口 密钥 鉴权 认证

translations.01KQXQV12CZZ7RW5GTW81D11J7: 帮我写一些代码。我需要向您提供哪些信息来完成此操作？
translations.01KQXQV12EHGSCJ7R9RG4XM8Y9: 准备项目环境、构建代码索引并生成项目规则——让 agent 拥有更深入的理解和更出色的表现。
translations.01KQXQV12FNGNTFGDR6T0MFHC5: 设置一个项目，以便在 Warp 中优化编码体验。

notes: scheduled.rs 333/347/362: error_message flows into anyhow!("{}: {}", error_message, e) internal error, not UI -> telemetry_payload. scheduled.rs:95 model_type_name() returns a model identifier -> protocol_key. call_mcp_tool.rs 106/136/236: CallMCPToolResult::Error payloads fed back to the agent/conversation + telemetry (line 247 MCPServerTelemetryError), diagnostic not UI labels -> telemetry_payload. orchestration_pill_bar.rs 436/456/477/483/485: menu item labels -> translate (Oz brand kept, pane->窗格, agent kept English per glossary). persisted_workspace.rs:901 report_if_error! with_context -> log sink -> telemetry_payload; 957/996 DismissibleToast success/error UI -> translate, {} is binary_name (English) left standalone; 1116 DismissibleToast::error UI -> translate, {workspace_root_display}/{e} preserved. billing modal 128/130: format! titles, {object_type} renders English word ('notebook'/'workflow'...) + literal 's' plural, so kept {object_type}s as a bracketed English unit. 24 const header -> translate. voice.rs 75/535/537/540: popup label + tooltips UI -> translate, backtick `{}` key placeholder preserved. env_var_collection.rs:108 = EditableBinding name field (identifier, cloned into trigger/custom_keybinding) -> protocol_key; :109 description field (KRBDMFR..., also workflow_view.rs:134) renders in keybindings UI -> translate '关闭'; 362/363 ValidationError messages UI -> translate (.env / 'Settings > Privacy' rendered as 设置 > 隐私); 755 toast error UI -> translate. experiments/mod.rs: NO_LAYER_FOUND_ERR(:44) used at panic!(:226) -> panic_message; INVALID_GROUP_ASSIGNMENT_ERR(:39) used at panic!(:293) -> panic_message; INVALID_USER_OVERRIDE_ERR(:42) only log::error!(:310) -> telemetry_payload. quit_warning/mod.rs 311/317/335: appended to quit-warning dialog info text -> translate UI, leading space + {} preserved. platform_page.rs:431 search_terms -> bilingual; :668 '%b %-d, %Y' strftime format -> protocol_key; :694 'wk-**{}' masked api key prefix format -> protocol_key; :455 'Documentation.' hyperlink label -> translate. show_blocks_view.rs 102/92 URL fragments -> protocol_key; 142/780 SavePosition element ids -> protocol_key; 753 search_terms -> bilingual. grid_handler.rs 100/102/103 are /// doc comments inside lazy_static! body -> extractor_false_positive_doc_comment; 1192/1248 .expect("Fragment should exist") -> panic_message. prompt_suggestions.rs 74/75/77/80/83 query() strings become the user's composed agent prompt (user-facing) -> translate. global_rules.rs 228/232/263/267 all inside safe_warn! (Sentry/telemetry) -> telemetry_payload. onboarding project_slide.rs 126/137/215/410/411 titles/labels/descriptions UI -> translate, em-dash -> ——, 'agent' kept lowercase as in source.
